title: CrabLaw-CN Litigation Matter
description: Static registration record for a PRC litigation or arbitration case. Deadlines (举证/开庭/上诉/执行期限) are NOT stored here; they live in compliance-deadline records (obligationType=litigation-deadline) so the watcher remains the single source of truth and dates cannot drift across two stores.

forumType.description: Adjudication forum. people-court=人民法院; arbitration-commission=仲裁委员会; administrative-review=行政复议机关; administrative-litigation=行政诉讼(人民法院); enforcement-court=执行法院; other=其他

forumName.description: Named court or arbitration commission, e.g. 北京市第一中级人民法院 / 中国国际经济贸易仲裁委员会.

caseNumber.description: 案号, e.g. (2024)京01民初123号. Omit before case is filed/docketed.

causeOfAction.description: 案由 (cause of action), e.g. 买卖合同纠纷.

partyRole.description: Our client's procedural position. plaintiff=原告; defendant=被告; third-party=第三人; appellant=上诉人; appellee=被上诉人; applicant=申请人; respondent=被申请人; claimant=仲裁申请人; other=其他

instance.description: Procedural stage. first-instance=一审; second-instance=二审; retrial=再审; enforcement=执行; arbitration=仲裁; preservation=保全; other=其他

claimAmount.description: 诉请/标的金额 as text (preserve original units and currency; never coerce to float).

claimSummary.description: Short summary of the claims or relief sought.

preservation.description: True if property/evidence preservation (财产/证据保全) is involved.

sourceRef.description: Pointer to the governing source; required when citationTag is [已核验-来源].
